issues.description: Counter triggers should use 'Counter', not 'OnAttacked'. Counter is a special trigger type for defensive responses.
Target should include Leader option: 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter', not just 'ChooseOwnCharacter'
Second effect should also use 'Counter' trigger, not generic 'Trigger'
Action should be custom/placement effect to 'place at bottom of deck', not 'ReturnToHand'. No standard action type matches this game mechanic.
Target should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' (your own cards), not opponent's. Card text says 'your... Character cards'
maxCost value of 6 is incorrect. Effect specifies cost 1 or less, so maxCost should be 1

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, place up to 1 Character with a cost of 1 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

actions.description: Place up to 1 of your Character cards with cost ≤1 at the bottom of your deck
